title: alsophila meridionalis
intro: Alsophila meridionalis, also known as the Red Fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Alsophila meridionalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, with some herbal preparations also using it in combination with other plants.
